hero.title: The taste of a true New York deli in Toulouse
hero.subtitle: Signature sandwiches, fine charcuterie, and carefully sourced grocery products.

cards.title: Sandwiches & Pastrami
cards.description: Our New York classics made to order with carefully chosen breads and house-made sauces.

cards.title: Charcuterie & Cheeses
cards.description: Boards to share, blending bold French products with the spirit of a neighborhood deli.

cards.title: Wines & Beers
cards.description: Independent bottles and craft beers for takeaway, pairing, or enjoying in the deli.

aboutTeaser.title: A story of neighborhood and flavor
aboutTeaser.paragraphOne: Mow's Deli was built to combine New York deli energy with the warmth of Toulouse.
aboutTeaser.paragraphTwo: Our team serves honest plates, curates lively grocery shelves, and welcomes everyone like a local.

items.quote: The sandwiches are incredible, and the welcome makes you want to come back every week.
items.name: Camille R.

items.quote: A true neighborhood deli atmosphere, with a sharp and thoughtful bottle selection.
items.name: Julien M.

items.quote: Excellent products, warm service, already a must-visit address in Toulouse.
items.name: Sarah D.

menu.pageSubtitle: Explore our signature sandwiches, charcuterie and cheese boards, and a curated bottle selection.

story.paragraph1: We created Mow's Deli as a bridge between New York and Toulouse, with a desire to share bold, generous recipes full of character.
story.paragraph2: We were inspired by neighborhood counters where people come to eat, talk, keep traditions, and discover new flavors.
story.paragraph3: We built a fine grocery concept in our own style, with products sourced from artisans and houses that work with care and honesty.
story.paragraph4: We choose quality at every step, from bread to the final condiment, to offer a warm and consistent experience all year long.

items.title: Quality
items.text: We choose strong, flavorful ingredients and prepare them with care every day.

items.title: Sourcing
items.text: We prioritize trusted producers and short supply chains whenever possible.

items.title: Hospitality
items.text: We build a simple, lively, and welcoming atmosphere from lunch through evening service.

categories.title: Sweet Grocery

cta.title: Come discover our selection in store

wines.title: Wines & Beers
wines.intro: We build a lively cellar designed to support the menu and create direct pairings from lunch to late service.

pairings.title: Pastrami + Cabernet Franc
pairings.note: A structured and spicy pairing that supports the richness of pastrami.

pairings.title: Reuben + IPA
pairings.note: Balanced bitterness in the IPA cuts through the Reuben's richness.

pairings.title: Cheese Board + Orange Wine
pairings.note: A textural, aromatic combination made for longer table moments.
